name: process_improvement
success_criteria: Identified gaps are addressed via a piloted improvement that shows measurable positive outcomes.

tasks.title: Map current state
tasks.description: Document the existing process end-to-end: steps, owners, inputs, outputs, cycle time, and pain points.

tasks.title: Identify gaps
tasks.description: Analyse the current state map for inefficiencies, bottlenecks, errors, and unmet needs.

tasks.title: Design improvements
tasks.description: Propose process changes that address the identified gaps. Design the future-state process map.

tasks.title: Pilot
tasks.description: Run the improved process in a controlled environment. Monitor for unintended side-effects.

tasks.title: Measure outcomes
tasks.description: Collect metrics from the pilot. Compare against the baseline. Decide: adopt, adjust, or abandon.
